SEARCH
Package com.keyin.ticketnestbackend.config

Class JwtSecurityConfig

java.lang.Object
com.keyin.ticketnestbackend.config.JwtSecurityConfig
@Configuration @EnableMethodSecurity public class JwtSecurityConfig extends Object
Configuration class for setting up JWT-based security in the application. It defines the security filter chain, password encoder, authentication manager, and CORS configuration. The class is annotated with @Configuration to indicate that it provides Spring beans, and @EnableMethodSecurity to enable method-level security annotations.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    JwtSecurityConfig(JwtUtil jwtUtil, CustomUserDetailsService uds)
    Constructs a JwtSecurityConfig with the required dependencies.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    org.springframework.security.authentication.AuthenticationManager
    authenticationManager(org.springframework.security.core.userdetails.UserDetailsService uds)
    Defines a bean for the authentication manager, which is responsible for processing authentication requests.
    org.springframework.web.cors.CorsConfigurationSource
    corsConfigurationSource()
    Defines a bean for CORS configuration, allowing cross-origin requests from specified origins, with allowed methods, headers, and credentials settings.
    org.springframework.security.crypto.password.PasswordEncoder
    passwordEncoder()
    Defines a bean for password encoding using BCryptPasswordEncoder.
    org.springframework.security.web.SecurityFilterChain
    securityFilterChain(org.springframework.security.config.annotation.web.builders.HttpSecurity http)
    Defines the security filter chain for the application, configuring HTTP security settings, including CSRF protection, CORS configuration, request authorization rules, and JWT authentication filter.

  • Constructor Details

    • JwtSecurityConfig

      public JwtSecurityConfig(JwtUtil jwtUtil, CustomUserDetailsService uds)
      Constructs a JwtSecurityConfig with the required dependencies.
      Parameters:
      jwtUtil - utility for JWT operations
      uds - custom user details service for loading user data during authentication

  • Method Details

    • securityFilterChain

      @Bean public org.springframework.security.web.SecurityFilterChain securityFilterChain(org.springframework.security.config.annotation.web.builders.HttpSecurity http) throws Exception
      Defines the security filter chain for the application, configuring HTTP security settings, including CSRF protection, CORS configuration, request authorization rules, and JWT authentication filter.
      Parameters:
      http - the HttpSecurity object used to configure security settings
      Returns:
      the configured SecurityFilterChain
      Throws:
      Exception - if an error occurs while configuring the security filter chain

    • passwordEncoder

      @Bean public org.springframework.security.crypto.password.PasswordEncoder passwordEncoder()
      Defines a bean for password encoding using BCryptPasswordEncoder.
      Returns:
      a PasswordEncoder instance that uses BCrypt hashing algorithm

    • authenticationManager

      @Bean public org.springframework.security.authentication.AuthenticationManager authenticationManager(org.springframework.security.core.userdetails.UserDetailsService uds)
      Defines a bean for the authentication manager, which is responsible for processing authentication requests.
      Parameters:
      uds - the UserDetailsService used to load user-specific data during authentication
      Returns:
      an AuthenticationManager instance configured with a DaoAuthenticationProvider

    • corsConfigurationSource

      @Bean public org.springframework.web.cors.CorsConfigurationSource corsConfigurationSource()
      Defines a bean for CORS configuration, allowing cross-origin requests from specified origins, with allowed methods, headers, and credentials settings.
      Returns:
      a CorsConfigurationSource that provides the CORS configuration for the application
